title: Quntum Chess
description: An ultra-premium, minimalistic strategy simulator introducing core laws of quantum mechanics into microscale chess. Running purely within standalone client-side browser layers, the application models particle dynamics across a 4x4 evaluation matrix grid. Players can execute complex Quantum Moves to split pieces into synchronous parallel superposition board states. The framework triggers automated 50% probability wavefunction collapses when phantom positions are engaged or challenged, resolving spatial coordinates instantly via pure vanilla JavaScript tree arrays without third-party engines.
